markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, provide feedback, and align on process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Early results are strong, with 5 new blogs ranking for \~120 keywords. The "New York City inspection" article leads in clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Process Feedback:** Rimkus requested stricter adherence to style guides (e.g., "life cycle" as two words, specific headline capitalization) and a ban on unreliable sources like ResearchGate.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** GrowthX will update writing guidelines, resubmit the "Net Zero Architecture" article for source correction, and implement a redline review process to track Rimkus's edits.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** A content audit report is due this week. Rimkus must confirm continuation by Monday, Nov 3, pending clarification on the contract term (12-month vs. month-to-month).](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Backlog

  - [**Performance:** The first 5 blogs are performing well, ranking for \~120 keywords and driving organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [**Top Performer:** "New York City inspection" article (most clicks).](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
      - [**Top Position:** "Best practices for sustainable MEP design" (highest average Google position).](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [**Backlog:** 5 new blogs are in editing, due tomorrow. This creates a publishing buffer to maintain a consistent schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**GA4 Issue:** Blog URLs are not appearing in the GA4 performance table. GrowthX is investigating.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### Process Feedback & Style Guide Updates

  - [Rimkus requested stricter adherence to style guides to improve quality and consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**Specific Style Rules:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**"Life cycle":** Must be two words (AP style).](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Headline Capitalization:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
          - Words \<3 letters (e.g., "for," "and") → lowercase.
          - Words \<2 letters (e.g., "a," "an") → lowercase.
          - [Exceptions: First/last word, or words of crucial importance.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Source Verification:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "Net Zero Architecture Strategies" article cited ResearchGate, which Rimkus deemed unreliable due to inconsistent peer-review.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**New Rule:** Exclude ResearchGate. Prioritize .gov, .org, and peer-reviewed industry journals.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**Competitor Content:** GrowthX will manually check for competitor bylines (e.g., JS Held), as AI detection is not feasible.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)

### Content Audit & Contract Renewal

  - [**Audit Report:** Due end-of-week, identifying content for refresh, rewrite, or removal.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [**Renewal Decision:** Rimkus must decide on continuation by Monday, Nov 3.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [**Contract Term:** Jennifer Bulmash needs clarification on the term (12-month vs. month-to-month) to present the decision to Vitaly.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Rimkus plans to move forward but needs to assess overlap with other MarTech solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida Knežević (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines with new style and source rules.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Resubmit "Net Zero Architecture" article for source correction.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [Implement redline review process to track Rimkus's edits.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [Clarify contract terms with Customer Ops.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new blog drafts by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - [Deliver content audit report by end-of-week.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [**Jennifer Bulmash (Rimkus):**](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Send finalized Rimkus tone-of-voice document to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Confirm renewal decision by Monday, Nov 3.](https://fathom.video/share/LpnyXgxazxbPD6YjV1gDrCJByY6uvqgC?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
